html:
Exclusive to:

The Chiminea is a Structure in the Shipwrecked DLC, which works just like the Firepit. It provides light and heat, allows food to be cooked, and doesn't set surrounding objects on Fire (unlike the Campfire). It requires 2 Limestone, 2 Sand and 2 Logs to be crafted, and it is available from the beginning of the game without any stations.

The Chiminea is essential during the Hurricane Season, since Campfires and Firepits are extinguished much faster by Strong Winds and Rain. It is also immune to Tides, and Flooding during Monsoon Season, meaning the fire will not immediately extinguish itself if there is flooding below the Chiminea.

The Ice Flingomatic can still extinguish the Chiminea if within range. The structure itself cannot be burned or catch fire. One Charcoal will be dropped by a Chiminea that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out.

Tips

  • While the Chiminea does not require a Science Machine to build, two of the ingredients, Limestone and Sand, are difficult to obtain without one (or otherwise having access to the required recipes through Wickerbottom).

Gallery

  • A lit Chiminea.
  • A Chiminea functioning on flooded ground.
Craftable ItemsStructures

"chiminea"
“Take that, wind!”
–Wilson
“Do you like your house, fire? You're welcome.”
–Willow
“Be safe from wind, little fire.”
–Wolfgang
“This shall protect a fire from the wind's prying fingers.”
–Wendy
“PROTECTION FOR FIRES FROM ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARDS”
–WX-78
“Invented by an astute meteorologist!”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like armor for fire.”
–Woodie
“Safe keeping for my hard earned fires.”
–Maxwell
“Ah ha! I have achieved efficient combustion!”
–Wagstaff
“What kind öf fire hides in a höle?”
–Wigfrid
“Our fires can stay safe from the wind's clutches.”
–Webber
“Stay safe from the howling winds, precious light!”
–Walani
“I wonder if this could be converted into a pizza oven?”
–Warly
“Keeps th'wind off a good fire.”
–Woodlegs
“FOR FWOOSHINGS O' THE SEA”
–Wilba
“Makes water fires”
–Wormwood
“A nice cozy place for a nice cozy fire.”
–Wheeler
The Chiminea is a Structure in the Shipwrecked DLC, which works just like the Firepit. It provides light and heat, allows food to be cooked, and doesn't set surrounding objects on Fire (unlike the Campfire). It requires 2 Limestone, 2 Sand and 2 Logs to be crafted, and it is available from the beginning of the game without any stations.
The Chiminea is essential during the Hurricane Season, since Campfires and Firepits are extinguished much faster by Strong Winds and Rain. It is also immune to Tides, and Flooding during Monsoon Season, meaning the fire will not immediately extinguish itself if there is flooding below the Chiminea.
The Ice Flingomatic can still extinguish the Chiminea if within range. The structure itself cannot be burned or catch fire. One Charcoal will be dropped by a Chiminea that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out.
Tips[edit | edit source]
While the Chiminea does not require a Science Machine to build, two of the ingredients, Limestone and Sand, are difficult to obtain without one (or otherwise having access to the required recipes through Wickerbottom).
